evidence.text: Operating profit for ABL was $128.1 million (14.5% of ABL net sales) for the three months ended November 30, 2021 compared to $98.4 million (13.1% of ABL net sales) in the prior-year period, an increase of $29.7 million. The increase in operating profit was due primarily to contributions from higher sales partially offset by increased materials and freight costs as well as higher operating costs to support the increase in sales.
